name: omarchy_common_tweaks
content:
Common tweaks 
This is a coection of common taiorings to the Omarchy setup. Know that it might
occasionay be necessary for system updates to restore certain configs to their origina
condition. If this happens, your changes won't be ost, but put in a .bak  fie in the same
directory.
If you screw something up, you can restore individua configs to their origina setup via
Update > Config in the Omarchy menu. If you reay screw everything up, you can reset a
configs via omarchy-reinstall.
Revea a tray icons a the time 
By defaut, tray icons, ike Dropbox, 1password, or Steam, are hidden behind the tray
expander icon. If you'd ike to have them exposed a the time, you can change the group/
tray-expander ine to tray  in Waybar's ~/.config/waybar/config.jsonc (access via
Setup > Config > Waybar).
Rounded window corners 
Omarchy's defaut design is one of square corners, but if you ike to soften that up a bit,
you can change ~/.config/hypr/looknfeel.conf so rounding is no onger commented
out:
decoration {
    # Use round window corners
    rounding = 8
}
Remove window gaps 
On aptop dispays, some peope prefer to not to waste any pixes on window gaps (or
even a top bar, which you can togge off with Super + Shift + Space). You can remove a
gaps by removing the comments in this section of ~/.config/hypr/looknfeel.conf:
general {
Common tweaks · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/102/common-tweaks
1 of 2 2/2/26, 1:27 AM

---

    # No gaps between windows or borders
    gaps_in = 0
    gaps_out = 0
    border_size = 0
}
